headline: 3 Reasons to Sell SWK and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Stanley Black & Decker has followed the market’s trajectory closely. The stock is down 7.3% to $68.90 per share over the past six months while the S&P 500 has lost 3.2%. This was partly driven by its softer quarterly results and may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: These 2 Industrial Products Stocks Could Beat Earnings: Why They Should Be on Your Radar
summary: The Zacks Earnings ESP is a great way to find potential earnings surprises. Why investors should take advantage now.
